form.formComment: Drawn the inside. At the last outing finished 4th over 460m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (26.31) behind Raging Fury in a Mix 6/7 on April 10. Holds top-three claims.

form.formComment: Strong performance leading throughout to score by 2.5 lengths in a Mix 6/7 last start at Warrnambool, recording a quick 22.13 over the 390m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 400m. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Recorded his 3rd career win last time out (23.01) at this track and drawn box 5 for the first time here. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 400m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (23.07) behind He's A Collinda in a Mix 6/7 on April 10. Has a blistering 22.62 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.
